objective: Accept the frozen 20000-token total mission reservation at the connected Worker dispatch boundary while retaining binding-specific provider output ceilings.
executable_blocker: The exact Research Worker call remains RESERVED with zero transmission because Dispatch.load rejects max_tokens=20000 under a stale <=16384 total-bound validator.
stop_condition: Any change beyond the one total-reservation validator and its regression evidence, any output-ceiling widening, or any provider transmission during validation.
expected_receipt: IntegrationReceipt plus exact Worker image/deploy and same-call recovery evidence
rollback: Revert the additive commit and retain the exact RESERVED call without dispatch.
